chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 538 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.08.2023. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 10267/2017. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Syed Ghulam Haider Shah Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. ----- The Deputy Commissioner was sought to direct the concerned Mukhtiarkar Taluka Sinjhoro District Sanghar, to mutate the property in the names of the family of the petitioner which include petitioner, his brother Habib ur Rehman, Najeeb ur Rehman, sister Mst Mahnaz Yasmeen and also the name of deceased brother Mujeeb ur Rehman and afterwards the names of deceased Mujeeb ur Rehman as L.Rs to be shown as persons / legal heirs to whom the property was devolved. We have heard the learned counsel and appear that these intricate questions that goes to the entitlement of the property cannot be adjudicated in these proceedings under Article 199. The petitioner may, however, invoke the jurisdiction of a Civil Court where the concern of the petitioner could be redressed. Petition is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
